name: epigrass-creator
description: Create Epigrass epidemiological models with GeoPackage support. Step-by-step wizard for SIR, SEIR, SEIS, SIS, SI and custom models.
author: OpenClaw Community
examples: Create an SIR model for dengue in Brazilian cities
Build a SEIR metapopulation model for COVID-19
Generate a custom model with hospitalization
Create model using GeoPackage with 5000+ cities
features: 5 built-in compartmental models (SIR, SEIR, SEIS, SIS, SI)
Multiple network connection types (full, distance, neighbors, manual)
Automatic edges.csv generation with Haversine distance
